title: koeleria cristata subsp. gracilis
intro: Koeleria cristata subsp. gracilis, also known as the blue grama grass or slender Koeleria, is a type of perennial grass native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of digestive issues and reduce inflammation in the body. The health benefits of Koeleria cristata subsp. gracilis include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce fever, and improve respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Koeleria cristata subsp. gracilis can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effectiveness and potential side effects.
